query:
SELECT 
  LEFT(paid_at, 10) AS paid_date,
  SUM(CAST(payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS cache_sum
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND is_close_row = 1
  AND LEFT(paid_at, 10) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30'
GROUP BY LEFT(paid_at, 10)
ORDER BY paid_date
LIMIT 10;
